analysis.strategyReview: Our content strategy shows strong vertical coverage with comprehensive 'How to Work X Leads' guides across insurance, mortgage, legal, and home services sectors. We've built a solid foundation in lead management fundamentals and CRM systems. However, we have significant gaps in advanced sales psychology, lead nurturing automation beyond basic drip campaigns, and emerging compliance challenges. Our buying leads pillar is well-developed, but we're missing content on lead quality assessment tools and vendor performance tracking that goes beyond basic ROI.
analysis.competitiveInsights: AgedLeadStore.com focuses heavily on product features and basic lead working tips, while AgedLeadSales.com stays narrow on aged lead tactics. We have opportunities in advanced lead qualification frameworks, multi-touch attribution modeling, and compliance automation tools. Search volume is increasing for 'lead scoring automation,' 'AI compliance monitoring,' and 'multi-vendor lead management.' There's also growing interest in 'lead conversion psychology' and 'behavioral triggers in lead follow-up' that neither competitor addresses comprehensively.
newOpportunities: Lead qualification frameworks beyond basic scoring
recommendedUpdates: Expand CRM automation content beyond basic workflows
Create advanced lead psychology content series

imageOutcomes.title: Lead Qualification Framework: Score and Prioritize Internet Leads for Maximum ROI
imageOutcomes.detail:
Could not load the "sharp" module using the linux-x64 runtime
Possible solutions:
- Ensure optional dependencies can be installed:
    npm install --include=optional sharp
- Ensure your package manager supports multi-platform installation:
    See https://sharp.pixelplumbing.com/install#cross-platform
- Add platform-specific dependencies:
    npm install --os=linux --cpu=x64 sharp
- Consult the installation documentation:
    See https://sharp.pixelplumbing.com/install

newBriefs.title: Lead Qualification Framework: Score and Prioritize Internet Leads for Maximum ROI
newBriefs.competitiveAngle: Goes beyond basic lead scoring to create a comprehensive qualification framework with behavioral triggers and multi-factor assessment
outline: The Cost of Unqualified Lead Pursuit
BANT vs Modern Internet Lead Qualification

newBriefs.title: Conversion Psychology for Internet Leads: Behavioral Triggers That Drive Sales
newBriefs.competitiveAngle: First comprehensive guide applying behavioral psychology principles specifically to internet lead conversion, not generic sales psychology
outline: The 6 Psychological Drivers of Internet Lead Conversion
Cognitive Biases in Lead Decision Making

newBriefs.title: Multi-Vendor Lead Performance Dashboard: Track ROI Across All Your Lead Sources
newBriefs.competitiveAngle: Comprehensive guide to building performance dashboards for buyers using multiple lead vendors, not covered by vendor-specific competitors

nextWeekPlan: Selected 3 new briefs addressing identified content gaps rather than existing calendar items. Monday focuses on advanced lead management (qualification frameworks), Wednesday covers sales psychology (a major gap vs competitors), and Friday addresses multi-vendor tracking (buying leads pillar). All topics are trending and not covered by existing content.
